message:
refactor(parser,pager,btree): consolidate semantic tests, remove redundant global cache counters, add ptrmap test

Three independent improvements:

Parser test consolidation:
- Delete semantic_rowid_test.rs and semantic_test_hack.rs (identical
  duplicate files containing test_rowid_resolution)
- Inline the test into semantic.rs mod tests block where make_schema()
  helper already exists
- Remove mod semantic_test_hack from lib.rs
- Simplify GROUP BY/HAVING/WINDOW resolution in resolve_select_core:
  add VALUES row expression resolution, drop verbose comments

Page cache cleanup (page_cache.rs):
- Remove global_hits and global_misses AtomicU64 fields from
  ShardedPageCache — redundant with per-shard hit/miss counters
- Strip all global_hits.fetch_add / global_misses.fetch_add calls
  from get, with_page, with_page_mut, get_or_read_with, try_get,
  and reset_metrics

B-tree ptrmap test (freelist.rs):
- New test_ptrmap_entry_offset_last_page_in_group_with_pending_byte
  regression test for offset calculation at page group boundaries
  (page 262402 with usable_size 4096)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
